title: Dude, You're Gonna Be a Dad
author: John Pfeiffer
subline: How to get (and keep) your head and heart ready for fatherhood.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A row of 9 onesies (small T-shirt silhouettes) hanging on a clothesline — one for each month. The LAST onesie is RED (the new arrival). -->
  <g transform="translate(80 400)" fill="none">
    <!-- Clothesline -->
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="1440" y2="0" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- 9 onesies (T-shapes) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <g transform="translate(80 0)">
        <path d="M 0 30 L 0 240 M 0 30 L -20 30 L -40 70 L -20 90 L 0 60 M 0 30 L 20 30 L 40 70 L 20 90 L 0 60 M 0 60 L 0 240"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="0" y2="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
        <line x1="-20" y1="-10" x2="20" y2="-10" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(240 0)">
        <path d="M 0 30 L 0 240 M 0 30 L -20 30 L -40 70 L -20 90 L 0 60 M 0 30 L 20 30 L 40 70 L 20 90 L 0 60 M 0 60 L 0 240"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="0" y2="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
        <line x1="-20" y1="-10" x2="20" y2="-10" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(400 0)">
        <path d="M 0 30 L 0 240 M 0 30 L -20 30 L -40 70 L -20 90 L 0 60 M 0 30 L 20 30 L 40 70 L 20 90 L 0 60 M 0 60 L 0 240"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="0" y2="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
        <line x1="-20" y1="-10" x2="20" y2="-10" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(560 0)">
        <path d="M 0 30 L 0 240 M 0 30 L -20 30 L -40 70 L -20 90 L 0 60 M 0 30 L 20 30 L 40 70 L 20 90 L 0 60 M 0 60 L 0 240"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="0" y2="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
        <line x1="-20" y1="-10" x2="20" y2="-10" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(720 0)">
        <path d="M 0 30 L 0 240 M 0 30 L -20 30 L -40 70 L -20 90 L 0 60 M 0 30 L 20 30 L 40 70 L 20 90 L 0 60 M 0 60 L 0 240"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="0" y2="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
        <line x1="-20" y1="-10" x2="20" y2="-10" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(880 0)">
        <path d="M 0 30 L 0 240 M 0 30 L -20 30 L -40 70 L -20 90 L 0 60 M 0 30 L 20 30 L 40 70 L 20 90 L 0 60 M 0 60 L 0 240"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="0" y2="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
        <line x1="-20" y1="-10" x2="20" y2="-10" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1040 0)">
        <path d="M 0 30 L 0 240 M 0 30 L -20 30 L -40 70 L -20 90 L 0 60 M 0 30 L 20 30 L 40 70 L 20 90 L 0 60 M 0 60 L 0 240"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="0" y2="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
        <line x1="-20" y1="-10" x2="20" y2="-10" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(1200 0)">
        <path d="M 0 30 L 0 240 M 0 30 L -20 30 L -40 70 L -20 90 L 0 60 M 0 30 L 20 30 L 40 70 L 20 90 L 0 60 M 0 60 L 0 240"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="0" y2="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
        <line x1="-20" y1="-10" x2="20" y2="-10" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <!-- 9th onesie is RED (the new arrival) -->
      <g transform="translate(1360 0)" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
        <path d="M 0 30 L 0 240 M 0 30 L -20 30 L -40 70 L -20 90 L 0 60 M 0 30 L 20 30 L 40 70 L 20 90 L 0 60 M 0 60 L 0 240"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="0" y2="30" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <line x1="-20" y1="-10" x2="20" y2="-10" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- Tiny month labels under each onesie -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="0.2em">
      <text x="80" y="280">M1</text>
      <text x="240" y="280">M2</text>
      <text x="400" y="280">M3</text>
      <text x="560" y="280">M4</text>
      <text x="720" y="280">M5</text>
      <text x="880" y="280">M6</text>
      <text x="1040" y="280">M7</text>
      <text x="1200" y="280">M8</text>
      <text x="1360" y="280" fill="#fc1c46">BABY</text>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Fatherhood: a clothesline of 9 onesies, one for each month of pregnancy, all in graphite 1.5px hairlines. The 9th onesie (the rightmost, the 'arrival') is RED. The cover is a literal laundry line of small T-shirts. Title sits in the bottom 1/3, weight 500 command, mixed-case. Brand 'DAD-TO-BE' in the top-left; pill '9 MOS' at the top — the timeline the book tracks.
